# Provision the @neo-fable-clio identity node + ModelStats row (repo substrate leaf)

## Context

Repo-scope deliverable leaf split out of #12913 (the onboarding parent), per the PR #12914 review's close-target Required Action: the parent owns first-boot runtime ACs (identity bind, wake self-registration + bidirectional negative proof, boot-assent, origin-story persistence) that cannot close on a substrate merge — so the PR's closing keyword needs a leaf that IS fully delivered by the merge.

`Release classification:` post-release onboarding substrate — non-blocking, boardless.

## Scope (exactly what PR #12914 delivers)

1. `ai/graph/identityRoots.mjs`: the distinct `@neo-fable-clio` AgentIdentity node — isolated-instance pattern (no static `subscriptionTemplate`), `reviewSemantics.crossFamilyApprovalQualified: false`, separate-identity memory provenance, `activationPrerequisites` encoding the first-boot ritual incl. the boot-assent decline path, `name: 'Clio'` per the bare-name rule with provenance comment, `participationStatus: 'temporarily_unreachable'` with populated non-default fields (out of quorum/routing until activation).
2. `learn/agentos/ModelStats.md`: §neo_fable_clio under §pending_swarm_identities (capability fields reference §neo_fable as single source — no duplication) + live-registry metadata (`Last updated`, `§update_history` row).

The Contract Ledger for these surfaces lives on the parent (#12913, rows 1 + 4); this leaf inherits it.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The identity node lands with the shape above; `node --check` + seed round-trip green.
- [ ] The ModelStats row + registry metadata land per the update discipline.
- [ ] Adjacent identity suites green (MailboxService / AuthService / identityRoots / revalidationSweep).

## Out of Scope

- ALL first-boot runtime ACs — they stay on the parent #12913 (open until the operator stands up her instance and the ritual completes).
